name: Sausage Cheese Bites
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook and crumble the sausage in a skillet until done. Drain.
2. In a large bowl, combine the biscuit mix and cheese. Add the sausage and stir until well blended. Stir in water just until mixed.
3. Shape into 1 1/2-inch balls.
4. Place on greased baking sheets.
5. Bake at 375 degrees for about 15 minutes or until golden. Baked bites may be frozen; reheat at 375 degrees for 6-8 minutes.
